headline: Has Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) Run Ahead Of Its Value After Recent Share Price Rebound
summary: Investors may be wondering whether Take-Two Interactive Software at around US$238 a share still lines up with its fundamentals, or if the price has run ahead of the story. The stock is up 5.4% over the past week and 12.3% over the past month, while year to date it is down 5.3% and has returned 0.3% over the past year, compared with a 75.4% return over three years and 29.0% over five years. Recent headlines around Take-Two Interactive Software have centred on its position as a major video...
